name: ZTNAApplication
description: ZTNAApplication schema from Palo Alto Networks ZTNA Connector API

app_id.description: Unique identifier of the ZTNA application.

group_id.description: Connector group ID used to access this application.

fqdn.description: Fully qualified domain name of the private application.

protocols.description: Network protocols allowed for this application.

enabled.description: Whether ZTNA access for this application is enabled.
